title: Set up frontend project (React, Vite/Next.js)
description: Initialize frontend with modern UI framework and basic routing.

title: Implement login page UI (email/password, Google)
description: Create a modern login form with email/password fields and Google sign-in button.

title: Set up backend project (Node.js/Express or Next.js API)
description: Initialize backend with API endpoints for auth and user profile.

title: Implement Google OAuth authentication API
description: Create Google OAuth flow with /api/auth/google and /api/auth/google/callback endpoints.

title: Implement session management (JWT or cookie)
description: Store user session after login for local development.

title: Implement user profile API and page
description: Create /api/user/profile endpoint and frontend profile page to display user info.

title: Add error handling and basic tests
description: Handle login errors and add basic unit tests for auth and profile endpoints.
